TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kurgyzstan, title = Kurgyzstan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kurgyzstan} }

S.FORM: (Kurgyzstan) Circis sefu kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan na ryax nqu cinringan.kahul sa kyusanto na pzyugan nqu linhoyan na Cirlcis mincu pslokah(Democratic Movement Kyrgyzstan, DMK)AwSe mpciriq sa llamu nqu mincu.nanu yasa ini nha snhi qu kyusanto na Cirlcis na te qutux hisyo Aposama masalifu mshutaw qu cintman nya ru ini snhi nqu minsyu ru Ihwe .msblaq msswal mpkal lru.kahul sa Akayefu.Cirlcis na Kesyey yencang.maki sa kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mopuw byacing psenkyo ru magal mqeru pgan magal% wagiq na hyo tosen lru mtbuci sa te qutux nqu soto.kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan cyugal,gaga nqu koka sefu pinsrux nha ga nanak nqu mincu msqutux nqu linhoyan koka. psmsun nqu pintzyuwaw yang nqu soto ru thoki.kohwe ru sazing yang nqu.Sfa nqu pintzyuwaw yang spyang wagiq nqu Hoin,gaga na Hoin,qalang na Hoin ru kensakaq na mthoki.mluw sa psplang nqu mtzyaqih. kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mpayat tska nqu ryax.Akayefu mngyut kura mtlokah na klahang.nanu yasa pira kawas lga.maki sa Ihwe nqu pinsyaqih. Akayefu pwah sa Kongmin psenkyo hinkangi sa inlungan nqu psrux.yang kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mtzyu ru sazing byacing ru kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mspat mopuw byacing na pkbalay na gaga pkhopa na kenli nqu soto ru pyu sa senkyo na gaga.kawas sazing seng ru sazing byacing cyugal .mhtuw sa kura mkilux na qalang Ahesi mtzyu phmut phantay kmzyap Tanzen squliq nqu minsyu ptusan nqu kinsat na zyuwaw.nanu yasa koka nqu kwara nqu hantay.maki sa minsyu nqu linhoyan ru hantay tan na rayhyo nqu mpgluw nqu Akayefu nqu soto ptgih sa gaga ptyugan nqu koka.cintaring nha ga sefu,minsyu,ru syakay nqu rayhyo khopa nha ptgih mkkal sa minsyu .nanu yasa mhtuw qu kawas sazing seng ru sazing byacing ryax na senkyo mhtuw ptyaqih sa kongmin nqu senkyo qani powah sa kongmin nqu senkyo pkblazyu nha qu gaga na koka nanu yasa khopa nha qu son maha kenli nqu soto ru Kohwe ru gaga koka lga cipoq qu kenli nha la.pinkita nha sa giqas nqu gaga koka ga.maki sa kawas sazing seng ru magal babaw nqu minsenkyo.aki sazing nqu linhoyan nqu kohwe lga pzyugun nha cintman mpitu pgan magal nqu qutux linhoyan na kohwe.Sefu nqu iyat bbalay mglen maras nqu squliq nyux pposa giqas nqu klahng nha. aki nyux ptaring kayket spyang pspyon nha ga gaga nqu koka. linhoyan nqu psqutux inlungan ptke mha mtzyu byacing lga psenkyo ta squ soto mha nanu abaw nqu cyugal byacing lga psenkyo ta kohwe nqu senkyo la. kawas sazing seng ru magal mtyaqih qu kinlahang nqu Cirlcis.mquriq qu inlungang nha maki sa te sazing nqu psenkyo.ini kskyut mwah ptyaqih nqu pincyugan.sngsan nha ga pinsnan nha sefu mha alax squ citman .cyugal byacing mpusal payat ryax.pkaki qutux mang msyaw squliq mwah sa Piskayke ppsina nha soto ki sefu nya mha alax qu cintman mamu ma.nanu yasa qu"Yicinpzyugan nqu kinlahang".wayal gleng mge sa Hasake qu soto Akayefu.babaw nya lga tehuk sa Moske.cyugal bhacing ru mpusal spat ryax lga.Cirlcisgiqas nqu Ihwe psenkyo qutux hantay nqu pglng nqu squliq,qsu nqu thoki Payecifu ma sefu nqu mrhuw.ru rayli msoto nqu ru zyuwaw na pcyagun soto.maki sa Moske soto ka Akayefu byacing mpayat ryax nqu mpayat malax kinthken nya la. Psmsun zyuwaw nqu psplang Ana cingay qu kahul sa te byaqan wagi.ana koci nqu pzyugan nqu psplan na pila cicin linhoyan na knraw.babaw nqu mbuci koka Cirlcis Psmsun zyuwaw nqu psplang zzihung balay ptaring hga.mtbugih qu Sulin貿mtbugah qu linhoyan nqu psplang nha ru tbiran nha uzi ga mtggyut mtciku.pqhut sa koka nqu mtbazi na psplang nqu qutux pincyagan.sefu mskut qu pila nha la.nanu yasa laxan nha kwara nqu ppraw nha pila.taring msina pyup pila.qutux uzi ga phtuw kura sa mtbazi nqu psplang nqu pintzyuwaw nqu klokah na inlungan.pwah squ pblaq nqu psplang nqu pzyugan pposa pintzyuwaw.hminas sa pinzyugan lga0koka nqu Cirlcis maki sa kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mspat mopuw sazing byacing ru ryax mpusal ptwang sa cinbwanan nqu psplang nqu linhoyan.Mtbugah qu Sulin nanu yasa wayal ungat qu hopa na tbiran .mtlokah ptyaqih psplang nqu Cirlcis. kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mqeru pgan mspat% ma Cirlcis pposa nqu qeqaya gaposu nha Sulinbinah qalang.nanu yasa maki mqeru pgan kawas mqu gleng.koka Cirlcis psplang nha ga spngan binah na gleng na Sulen Cyamon linhoyan nqu koka ga pyang yaqih.nanak slaqux nha gamciriq nqu Yameniya,Yasaypayzan ru Tacirl.misu nqu kawas ga.son mha psplang ga wayal blaq la.ana ga iyat pintehuk mtrhuw na psplang na..iyat ptehuk qu kilahang nqu syakay nqu klhangan.Koka nqu Cirlcis ga Nogyo nqu pinbahuw ga psrux nqu psplang.mqeru pgan ryax nqu gleng ga.pintzyuwaw na squliq nha ga maki sa kwara psplang nha ga1/3 tehuk 1/2.Kawas sazing seng ru sazing Nogyo Pinbahuw maki sa GDPkwara ga mtzyul magal.mtzyu%.magal smka na squliq linpgan na ptzyuwawa.koka Cirlcis rhyal nha ga cingay rgyax.blaq pintzyuwaw nqu qmayat pkwagiq.qani ga koka nqu Cirlcis spyang syunNogyo pinbahuw nqu ppzuy.spyang nqu pinbahuw ga yang mugi,sbin nqu ramat,sbus,tbaku,rramat ru bway qhoniq.bukil nqu mit,hi ru kinbalay nqu miruku spyang nqu pinbahuw na kinbalay. Pinbahuw nqu ptwangan nqu kbalay ga mkoba nqu psplang nqu linhoyan.skita nqu pila na binah ga cingay balay smoya.koka Cirlcis nqu Kwangzan ga kinhbuzyun balay.ana ga ungat qu abura ki kuki nha.sazing qani ga siki mazi kahul sa binah koka.koka qani ga Me,kin,Yo,Ti ru binah mnanak nqu kin ga cigay qu nyux nha skun khuw Yekin ga koka nqu Cirlcis pyang balay nqu koba na pcygun nha.aki nyux smoya pshot sa binah nqu pila na koka.kmal binah nqu qalang ptwang kbalay kin.baha hmswa ga kya kinhbuzyun qu qsy ru zit nqu koka nqu inkyasan na rgyax nha.koka Cirlcis pposu nha sa binah koka qu renki na qsya. koka Cirlcis spyang pposu nha sa kinbalay nqu qeqaya binah koka qani ga kya bbiru nqu kin ru kwangs,kinbalay nqu bukil nqu mit rullamu binah nqu pinbahuw,renki ru pkbalay nqu qeqaya.mzyup sa koka nha ga kuki,mqalux nqu kin,Hwasye kinbalay,qeqaya nqu kikay,qqhoniq,brbal na kinbalay,kya uzi qu nniqun ru pkbaly na zayryo.pyang ka pgluw nqu psplang ga yang Amerika,'Ros,Cunko,Teko,Ilang ru lingay na koka Tacirlke,Hasake,Wuzpeke,Tukuman Koka Cirlcis kura pposa Ti,Swein,mnanak nqu kin ru Hwasye.kahul Amerika mzyup ga Kuw,Iyu ru qeqaya nqu pkita nbuw,ramat abura,kinbalay nqu brbal,bwax,kikay,kikay nqu pinbahuw ru hhi. glgan qinryuxan nqu tuqi kisya ga cyugal kbhul mpitu pgan kokngli.kokng lu ma qinryuxan ga cyugal mang ru cyugal kbhul kongli.spyang nqu ppanga ru pposa gakonglu.skoki nqu pposa ga.maki sa qalang hopa Piskay ke nqu "Manas"koki ma hngagan ru Moske,giqas Sipoliya,Taska,Tusanpe na qalang maki qu skoki nha ki mtbuci nqu binah nqu koka na qalang.yang Wlumuci,Instanpaw,Falamkefu,Sinteli,Kelaz maki qu skoki na pinbku na spung ru ryax. Mincu (gag nqu qinnhan,ke,zyuwaw nqu kinbkisan uni ga sinnhen,llamu nqu squliq) Cirlcis kya mspat nqu minsyu.spyang hopa nqu mincu Cirlcis.pinkaki nqu Cirlcis koka linpgan lga mpitu pgan cyugal.cyugal%,gluw nqu micu ga Tucye.binah llamu nqu mincu ga Hasicitan(mspat％).mqupu mqyanux nqu te ghyaq Ros mincu.(magal.mtzyu％).ru maki sa'kura mkilux nqu Wuzpeke(mopuw payat.mtzyu％).spyang nqu cipoq mincu llamu nqu squliq na Tunkan(qutux.qutux ％)squliq na Werlwucu(qutux.qutux％)squliq na Tacike mincu(qutux.qutux ％)squliq na Hasakecu.(0.mpitu％)Wukelangcu(0.magal％)ru binah llamu nqu cipoq na mincu(qutux.qutux .mpitu％).kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mqeru tehuk sa sazing seng kawas ru mqeru nqu mopuw kawas gsa.maki squ koka Cirlcis na 'Roscu linpgan na squliq ga wayal ngyut mhgyut mopuw mtzyu mang cyugal seng cyugal kbhul mpatul payat squliq.maki sa koka Cirlcis nqu squliq Wuzpeke linpgan wayal mkwagiq tehuk sa mopuw mang qutux seng mpitu kbhul mpatul qutux hi koka nqu Cirlcis ga kya llamu nqu micu yang Tatarlcu linpgan squliq ga cyugal mang cyugal seng mpatul mspat mang,Turlci linpgan squliq ga cyugal mang mtzyu seng mpitu kbhu mpusal payatl,Yasaypayzan linpgan squliq ga qutux mang mtzyu seng mpitu kbhul mpatul magal ,Zawsincu linpgan squliq ga qutux seng mspat kbhul mzimal mpitu mang1,Teiz linpgan squliq ga qutux mang qutux seng qutux kbhul mpusal mspat .iyat nanak nqu nyux sbiru te krayat nqu mincu.koka nqu Cirlcis ga nyux kian squ squliq na 'Ros,squliq na Tukuman,squliq na Morltowa ru squliq na Cyawzya.linpgan squliq nqu koka Cirlcis ga mlikuy ga pkaki sa mpatul mqeru.mpayat4 %.kneril ga maki sa mzimal.mtzyu%. Kurgyzstan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 41 00 N, 75 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 199,951 sq km (maki' tay 87ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 191,801 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 8,150 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,727,553. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 55.40% , lhlahuy hya' ga 5.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 39.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bishkek. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 31 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Almazbek Atambayev, aring ryax 1 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

(Kurgyzstan) Circis sefu kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan na ryax nqu cinringan.kahul sa kyusanto na pzyugan nqu linhoyan na Cirlcis mincu pslokah(Democratic Movement Kyrgyzstan, DMK)AwSe mpciriq sa llamu nqu mincu.nanu yasa ini nha snhi qu kyusanto na Cirlcis na te qutux hisyo Aposama masalifu mshutaw qu cintman nya ru ini snhi nqu minsyu ru Ihwe .msblaq msswal mpkal lru.kahul sa Akayefu.Cirlcis na Kesyey yencang.maki sa kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mopuw byacing psenkyo ru magal mqeru pgan magal% wagiq na hyo tosen lru mtbuci sa te qutux nqu soto.kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan cyugal,gaga nqu koka sefu pinsrux nha ga nanak nqu mincu msqutux nqu linhoyan koka. psmsun nqu pintzyuwaw yang nqu soto ru thoki.kohwe ru sazing yang nqu.Sfa nqu pintzyuwaw yang spyang wagiq nqu Hoin,gaga na Hoin,qalang na Hoin ru kensakaq na mthoki.mluw sa psplang nqu mtzyaqih. kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mpayat tska nqu ryax.Akayefu mngyut kura mtlokah na klahang.nanu yasa pira kawas lga.maki sa Ihwe nqu pinsyaqih. Akayefu pwah sa Kongmin psenkyo hinkangi sa inlungan nqu psrux.yang kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mtzyu ru sazing byacing ru kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mspat mopuw byacing na pkbalay na gaga pkhopa na kenli nqu soto ru pyu sa senkyo na gaga.kawas sazing seng ru sazing byacing cyugal .mhtuw sa kura mkilux na qalang Ahesi mtzyu phmut phantay kmzyap Tanzen squliq nqu minsyu ptusan nqu kinsat na zyuwaw.nanu yasa koka nqu kwara nqu hantay.maki sa minsyu nqu linhoyan ru hantay tan na rayhyo nqu mpgluw nqu Akayefu nqu soto ptgih sa gaga ptyugan nqu koka.cintaring nha ga sefu,minsyu,ru syakay nqu rayhyo khopa nha ptgih mkkal sa minsyu .nanu yasa mhtuw qu kawas sazing seng ru sazing byacing ryax na senkyo mhtuw ptyaqih sa kongmin nqu senkyo qani powah sa kongmin nqu senkyo pkblazyu nha qu gaga na koka nanu yasa khopa nha qu son maha kenli nqu soto ru Kohwe ru gaga koka lga cipoq qu kenli nha la.pinkita nha sa giqas nqu gaga koka ga.maki sa kawas sazing seng ru magal babaw nqu minsenkyo.aki sazing nqu linhoyan nqu kohwe lga pzyugun nha cintman mpitu pgan magal nqu qutux linhoyan na kohwe.Sefu nqu iyat bbalay mglen maras nqu squliq nyux pposa giqas nqu klahng nha. aki nyux ptaring kayket spyang pspyon nha ga gaga nqu koka. linhoyan nqu psqutux inlungan ptke mha mtzyu byacing lga psenkyo ta squ soto mha nanu abaw nqu cyugal byacing lga psenkyo ta kohwe nqu senkyo la. kawas sazing seng ru magal mtyaqih qu kinlahang nqu Cirlcis.mquriq qu inlungang nha maki sa te sazing nqu psenkyo.ini kskyut mwah ptyaqih nqu pincyugan.sngsan nha ga pinsnan nha sefu mha alax squ citman .cyugal byacing mpusal payat ryax.pkaki qutux mang msyaw squliq mwah sa Piskayke ppsina nha soto ki sefu nya mha alax qu cintman mamu ma.nanu yasa qu"Yicinpzyugan nqu kinlahang".wayal gleng mge sa Hasake qu soto Akayefu.babaw nya lga tehuk sa Moske.cyugal bhacing ru mpusal spat ryax lga.Cirlcisgiqas nqu Ihwe psenkyo qutux hantay nqu pglng nqu squliq,qsu nqu thoki Payecifu ma sefu nqu mrhuw.ru rayli msoto nqu ru zyuwaw na pcyagun soto.maki sa Moske soto ka Akayefu byacing mpayat ryax nqu mpayat malax kinthken nya la. Psmsun zyuwaw nqu psplang Ana cingay qu kahul sa te byaqan wagi.ana koci nqu pzyugan nqu psplan na pila cicin linhoyan na knraw.babaw nqu mbuci koka Cirlcis Psmsun zyuwaw nqu psplang zzihung balay ptaring hga.mtbugih qu Sulin貿mtbugah qu linhoyan nqu psplang nha ru tbiran nha uzi ga mtggyut mtciku.pqhut sa koka nqu mtbazi na psplang nqu qutux pincyagan.sefu mskut qu pila nha la.nanu yasa laxan nha kwara nqu ppraw nha pila.taring msina pyup pila.qutux uzi ga phtuw kura sa mtbazi nqu psplang nqu pintzyuwaw nqu klokah na inlungan.pwah squ pblaq nqu psplang nqu pzyugan pposa pintzyuwaw.hminas sa pinzyugan lga0koka nqu Cirlcis maki sa kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mspat mopuw sazing byacing ru ryax mpusal ptwang sa cinbwanan nqu psplang nqu linhoyan.Mtbugah qu Sulin nanu yasa wayal ungat qu hopa na tbiran .mtlokah ptyaqih psplang nqu Cirlcis. kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mqeru pgan mspat% ma Cirlcis pposa nqu qeqaya gaposu nha Sulinbinah qalang.nanu yasa maki mqeru pgan kawas mqu gleng.koka Cirlcis psplang nha ga spngan binah na gleng na Sulen Cyamon linhoyan nqu koka ga pyang yaqih.nanak slaqux nha gamciriq nqu Yameniya,Yasaypayzan ru Tacirl.misu nqu kawas ga.son mha psplang ga wayal blaq la.ana ga iyat pintehuk mtrhuw na psplang na..iyat ptehuk qu kilahang nqu syakay nqu klhangan.Koka nqu Cirlcis ga Nogyo nqu pinbahuw ga psrux nqu psplang.mqeru pgan ryax nqu gleng ga.pintzyuwaw na squliq nha ga maki sa kwara psplang nha ga1/3 tehuk 1/2.Kawas sazing seng ru sazing Nogyo Pinbahuw maki sa GDPkwara ga mtzyul magal.mtzyu%.magal smka na squliq linpgan na ptzyuwawa.koka Cirlcis rhyal nha ga cingay rgyax.blaq pintzyuwaw nqu qmayat pkwagiq.qani ga koka nqu Cirlcis spyang syunNogyo pinbahuw nqu ppzuy.spyang nqu pinbahuw ga yang mugi,sbin nqu ramat,sbus,tbaku,rramat ru bway qhoniq.bukil nqu mit,hi ru kinbalay nqu miruku spyang nqu pinbahuw na kinbalay. Pinbahuw nqu ptwangan nqu kbalay ga mkoba nqu psplang nqu linhoyan.skita nqu pila na binah ga cingay balay smoya.koka Cirlcis nqu Kwangzan ga kinhbuzyun balay.ana ga ungat qu abura ki kuki nha.sazing qani ga siki mazi kahul sa binah koka.koka qani ga Me,kin,Yo,Ti ru binah mnanak nqu kin ga cigay qu nyux nha skun khuw Yekin ga koka nqu Cirlcis pyang balay nqu koba na pcygun nha.aki nyux smoya pshot sa binah nqu pila na koka.kmal binah nqu qalang ptwang kbalay kin.baha hmswa ga kya kinhbuzyun qu qsy ru zit nqu koka nqu inkyasan na rgyax nha.koka Cirlcis pposu nha sa binah koka qu renki na qsya. koka Cirlcis spyang pposu nha sa kinbalay nqu qeqaya binah koka qani ga kya bbiru nqu kin ru kwangs,kinbalay nqu bukil nqu mit rullamu binah nqu pinbahuw,renki ru pkbalay nqu qeqaya.mzyup sa koka nha ga kuki,mqalux nqu kin,Hwasye kinbalay,qeqaya nqu kikay,qqhoniq,brbal na kinbalay,kya uzi qu nniqun ru pkbaly na zayryo.pyang ka pgluw nqu psplang ga yang Amerika,'Ros,Cunko,Teko,Ilang ru lingay na koka Tacirlke,Hasake,Wuzpeke,Tukuman Koka Cirlcis kura pposa Ti,Swein,mnanak nqu kin ru Hwasye.kahul Amerika mzyup ga Kuw,Iyu ru qeqaya nqu pkita nbuw,ramat abura,kinbalay nqu brbal,bwax,kikay,kikay nqu pinbahuw ru hhi. glgan qinryuxan nqu tuqi kisya ga cyugal kbhul mpitu pgan kokngli.kokng lu ma qinryuxan ga cyugal mang ru cyugal kbhul kongli.spyang nqu ppanga ru pposa gakonglu.skoki nqu pposa ga.maki sa qalang hopa Piskay ke nqu "Manas"koki ma hngagan ru Moske,giqas Sipoliya,Taska,Tusanpe na qalang maki qu skoki nha ki mtbuci nqu binah nqu koka na qalang.yang Wlumuci,Instanpaw,Falamkefu,Sinteli,Kelaz maki qu skoki na pinbku na spung ru ryax. Mincu (gag nqu qinnhan,ke,zyuwaw nqu kinbkisan uni ga sinnhen,llamu nqu squliq) Cirlcis kya mspat nqu minsyu.spyang hopa nqu mincu Cirlcis.pinkaki nqu Cirlcis koka linpgan lga mpitu pgan cyugal.cyugal%,gluw nqu micu ga Tucye.binah llamu nqu mincu ga Hasicitan(mspat％).mqupu mqyanux nqu te ghyaq Ros mincu.(magal.mtzyu％).ru maki sa'kura mkilux nqu Wuzpeke(mopuw payat.mtzyu％).spyang nqu cipoq mincu llamu nqu squliq na Tunkan(qutux.qutux ％)squliq na Werlwucu(qutux.qutux％)squliq na Tacike mincu(qutux.qutux ％)squliq na Hasakecu.(0.mpitu％)Wukelangcu(0.magal％)ru binah llamu nqu cipoq na mincu(qutux.qutux .mpitu％).kawas qutux seng mqeru kbhul mqeru pgan mqeru tehuk sa sazing seng kawas ru mqeru nqu mopuw kawas gsa.maki squ koka Cirlcis na 'Roscu linpgan na squliq ga wayal ngyut mhgyut mopuw mtzyu mang cyugal seng cyugal kbhul mpatul payat squliq.maki sa koka Cirlcis nqu squliq Wuzpeke linpgan wayal mkwagiq tehuk sa mopuw mang qutux seng mpitu kbhul mpatul qutux hi koka nqu Cirlcis ga kya llamu nqu micu yang Tatarlcu linpgan squliq ga cyugal mang cyugal seng mpatul mspat mang,Turlci linpgan squliq ga cyugal mang mtzyu seng mpitu kbhu mpusal payatl,Yasaypayzan linpgan squliq ga qutux mang mtzyu seng mpitu kbhul mpatul magal ,Zawsincu linpgan squliq ga qutux seng mspat kbhul mzimal mpitu mang1,Teiz linpgan squliq ga qutux mang qutux seng qutux kbhul mpusal mspat .iyat nanak nqu nyux sbiru te krayat nqu mincu.koka nqu Cirlcis ga nyux kian squ squliq na 'Ros,squliq na Tukuman,squliq na Morltowa ru squliq na Cyawzya.linpgan squliq nqu koka Cirlcis ga mlikuy ga pkaki sa mpatul mqeru.mpayat4 %.kneril ga maki sa mzimal.mtzyu%. Kurgyzstan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 41 00 N, 75 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 199,951 sq km (maki' tay 87ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 191,801 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 8,150 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,727,553. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 55.40% , lhlahuy hya' ga 5.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 39.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Bishkek. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 31 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Almazbek Atambayev, aring ryax 1 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: (kurɣjzs~ɕtan) ʦ~ʨirʦ~ʨis~ɕ s~ɕe*u kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan na rjax nqu ʦ~ʨinriŋan.kaħul s~ɕa kjus~ɕanto na pzjuɣan nqu linħojan na ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ minʦ~ʨu ps~ɕlokaħ(*emoʦ~ʨratiʦ~ʨ mo*ement kjrɣjzs~ɕtan, *mk)aws~ɕe mpʦ~ʨiriq s~ɕa llamu nqu minʦ~ʨu.nanu jas~ɕa ini nħa s~ɕnħi qu kjus~ɕanto na ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ na te qutux ħis~ɕjo apos~ɕama mas~ɕali*u ms~ɕħutaw qu ʦ~ʨintman nja ru ini s~ɕnħi nqu mins~ɕju ru iħwe .ms~ɕβlaq ms~ɕs~ɕwal mpkal lru.kaħul s~ɕa akaje*u.ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ na kes~ɕjej jenʦ~ʨaŋ.maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan mopuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ps~ɕenkjo ru maɣal mqeru pɣan maɣal% waɣiq na ħjo tos~ɕen lru mtβuʦ~ʨi s~ɕa te qutux nqu s~ɕoto.kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan ʦ~ʨjuɣal,ɣaɣa nqu koka s~ɕe*u pins~ɕrux nħa ɣa nanak nqu minʦ~ʨu ms~ɕqutux nqu linħojan koka. ps~ɕms~ɕun nqu pintzjuwaw jaŋ nqu s~ɕoto ru tħoki.koħwe ru s~ɕaziŋ jaŋ nqu.s~ɕ*a nqu pintzjuwaw jaŋ s~ɕpjaŋ waɣiq nqu ħoin,ɣaɣa na ħoin,qalaŋ na ħoin ru kens~ɕakaq na mtħoki.mluw s~ɕa ps~ɕplaŋ nqu mtzjaqiħ. kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan mpajat ts~ɕka nqu rjax.akaje*u mŋjut kura mtlokaħ na klaħaŋ.nanu jas~ɕa pira kawas~ɕ lɣa.maki s~ɕa iħwe nqu pins~ɕjaqiħ. akaje*u pwaħ s~ɕa koŋmin ps~ɕenkjo ħinkaŋi s~ɕa inluŋan nqu ps~ɕrux.jaŋ kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan mtzju ru s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan ms~ɕpat mopuw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na pkβalaj na ɣaɣa pkħopa na kenli nqu s~ɕoto ru pju s~ɕa s~ɕenkjo na ɣaɣa.kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal .mħtuw s~ɕa kura mkilux na qalaŋ aħes~ɕi mtzju pħmut pħantaj kmzjap tanzen s~ɕquliq nqu mins~ɕju ptus~ɕan nqu kins~ɕat na zjuwaw.nanu jas~ɕa koka nqu kwara nqu ħantaj.maki s~ɕa mins~ɕju nqu linħojan ru ħantaj tan na rajħjo nqu mpɣluw nqu akaje*u nqu s~ɕoto ptɣiħ s~ɕa ɣaɣa ptjuɣan nqu koka.ʦ~ʨintariŋ nħa ɣa s~ɕe*u,mins~ɕju,ru s~ɕjakaj nqu rajħjo kħopa nħa ptɣiħ mkkal s~ɕa mins~ɕju .nanu jas~ɕa mħtuw qu kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ rjax na s~ɕenkjo mħtuw ptjaqiħ s~ɕa koŋmin nqu s~ɕenkjo qani powaħ s~ɕa koŋmin nqu s~ɕenkjo pkβlazju nħa qu ɣaɣa na koka nanu jas~ɕa kħopa nħa qu s~ɕon maħa kenli nqu s~ɕoto ru koħwe ru ɣaɣa koka lɣa ʦ~ʨipoq qu kenli nħa la.pinkita nħa s~ɕa ɣiqas~ɕ nqu ɣaɣa koka ɣa.maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru maɣal βaβaw nqu mins~ɕenkjo.aki s~ɕaziŋ nqu linħojan nqu koħwe lɣa pzjuɣun nħa ʦ~ʨintman mpitu pɣan maɣal nqu qutux linħojan na koħwe.s~ɕe*u nqu ijat ββalaj mɣlen maras~ɕ nqu s~ɕquliq njux ppos~ɕa ɣiqas~ɕ nqu klaħŋ nħa. aki njux ptariŋ kajket s~ɕpjaŋ ps~ɕpjon nħa ɣa ɣaɣa nqu koka. linħojan nqu ps~ɕqutux inluŋan ptke mħa mtzju βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ps~ɕenkjo ta s~ɕqu s~ɕoto mħa nanu aβaw nqu ʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ps~ɕenkjo ta koħwe nqu s~ɕenkjo la. kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru maɣal mtjaqiħ qu kinlaħaŋ nqu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ.mquriq qu inluŋaŋ nħa maki s~ɕa te s~ɕaziŋ nqu ps~ɕenkjo.ini ks~ɕkjut mwaħ ptjaqiħ nqu pinʦ~ʨjuɣan.s~ɕŋs~ɕan nħa ɣa pins~ɕnan nħa s~ɕe*u mħa alax s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨitman .ʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mpus~ɕal pajat rjax.pkaki qutux maŋ ms~ɕjaw s~ɕquliq mwaħ s~ɕa pis~ɕkajke pps~ɕina nħa s~ɕoto ki s~ɕe*u nja mħa alax qu ʦ~ʨintman mamu ma.nanu jas~ɕa qu"jiʦ~ʨinpzjuɣan nqu kinlaħaŋ".wajal ɣleŋ mɣe s~ɕa ħas~ɕake qu s~ɕoto akaje*u.βaβaw nja lɣa teħuk s~ɕa mos~ɕke.ʦ~ʨjuɣal βħaʦ~ʨiŋ ru mpus~ɕal s~ɕpat rjax lɣa.ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕɣiqas~ɕ nqu iħwe ps~ɕenkjo qutux ħantaj nqu pɣlŋ nqu s~ɕquliq,qs~ɕu nqu tħoki pajeʦ~ʨi*u ma s~ɕe*u nqu mrħuw.ru rajli ms~ɕoto nqu ru zjuwaw na pʦ~ʨjaɣun s~ɕoto.maki s~ɕa mos~ɕke s~ɕoto ka akaje*u βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mpajat rjax nqu mpajat malax kintħken nja la. ps~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw nqu ps~ɕplaŋ ana ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu kaħul s~ɕa te βjaqan waɣi.ana koʦ~ʨi nqu pzjuɣan nqu ps~ɕplan na pila ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨin linħojan na knraw.βaβaw nqu mβuʦ~ʨi koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ ps~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw nqu ps~ɕplaŋ zziħuŋ βalaj ptariŋ ħɣa.mtβuɣiħ qu s~ɕulin*mtβuɣaħ qu linħojan nqu ps~ɕplaŋ nħa ru tβiran nħa uzi ɣa mtɣɣjut mtʦ~ʨiku.pqħut s~ɕa koka nqu mtβazi na ps~ɕplaŋ nqu qutux pinʦ~ʨjaɣan.s~ɕe*u ms~ɕkut qu pila nħa la.nanu jas~ɕa laxan nħa kwara nqu ppraw nħa pila.tariŋ ms~ɕina pjup pila.qutux uzi ɣa pħtuw kura s~ɕa mtβazi nqu ps~ɕplaŋ nqu pintzjuwaw nqu klokaħ na inluŋan.pwaħ s~ɕqu pβlaq nqu ps~ɕplaŋ nqu pzjuɣan ppos~ɕa pintzjuwaw.ħminas~ɕ s~ɕa pinzjuɣan lɣa*koka nqu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan ms~ɕpat mopuw s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru rjax mpus~ɕal ptwaŋ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨinβwanan nqu ps~ɕplaŋ nqu linħojan.mtβuɣaħ qu s~ɕulin nanu jas~ɕa wajal uŋat qu ħopa na tβiran .mtlokaħ ptjaqiħ ps~ɕplaŋ nqu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ. kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan mqeru pɣan ms~ɕpat% ma ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ ppos~ɕa nqu qeqaja ɣapos~ɕu nħa s~ɕulinβinaħ qalaŋ.nanu jas~ɕa maki mqeru pɣan kawas~ɕ mqu ɣleŋ.koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ ps~ɕplaŋ nħa ɣa s~ɕpŋan βinaħ na ɣleŋ na s~ɕulen ʦ~ʨjamon linħojan nqu koka ɣa pjaŋ jaqiħ.nanak s~ɕlaqux nħa ɣamʦ~ʨiriq nqu jamenija,jas~ɕajpajzan ru taʦ~ʨirl.mis~ɕu nqu kawas~ɕ ɣa.s~ɕon mħa ps~ɕplaŋ ɣa wajal βlaq la.ana ɣa ijat pinteħuk mtrħuw na ps~ɕplaŋ na..ijat pteħuk qu kilaħaŋ nqu s~ɕjakaj nqu klħaŋan.koka nqu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ ɣa noɣjo nqu pinβaħuw ɣa ps~ɕrux nqu ps~ɕplaŋ.mqeru pɣan rjax nqu ɣleŋ ɣa.pintzjuwaw na s~ɕquliq nħa ɣa maki s~ɕa kwara ps~ɕplaŋ nħa ɣa*/* teħuk */*.kawas~ɕ s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ ru s~ɕaziŋ noɣjo pinβaħuw maki s~ɕa ɣ*pkwara ɣa mtzjul maɣal.mtzju%.maɣal s~ɕmka na s~ɕquliq linpɣan na ptzjuwawa.koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ rħjal nħa ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj rɣjax.βlaq pintzjuwaw nqu qmajat pkwaɣiq.qani ɣa koka nqu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ s~ɕpjaŋ s~ɕjunnoɣjo pinβaħuw nqu ppzuj.s~ɕpjaŋ nqu pinβaħuw ɣa jaŋ muɣi,s~ɕβin nqu ramat,s~ɕβus~ɕ,tβaku,rramat ru βwaj qħoniq.βukil nqu mit,ħi ru kinβalaj nqu miruku s~ɕpjaŋ nqu pinβaħuw na kinβalaj. pinβaħuw nqu ptwaŋan nqu kβalaj ɣa mkoβa nqu ps~ɕplaŋ nqu linħojan.s~ɕkita nqu pila na βinaħ ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj s~ɕmoja.koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ nqu kwaŋzan ɣa kinħβuzjun βalaj.ana ɣa uŋat qu aβura ki kuki nħa.s~ɕaziŋ qani ɣa s~ɕiki mazi kaħul s~ɕa βinaħ koka.koka qani ɣa me,kin,jo,ti ru βinaħ mnanak nqu kin ɣa ʦ~ʨiɣaj qu njux nħa s~ɕkun kħuw jekin ɣa koka nqu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ pjaŋ βalaj nqu koβa na pʦ~ʨjɣun nħa.aki njux s~ɕmoja ps~ɕħot s~ɕa βinaħ nqu pila na koka.kmal βinaħ nqu qalaŋ ptwaŋ kβalaj kin.βaħa ħms~ɕwa ɣa kja kinħβuzjun qu qs~ɕj ru zit nqu koka nqu inkjas~ɕan na rɣjax nħa.koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ ppos~ɕu nħa s~ɕa βinaħ koka qu renki na qs~ɕja. koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ s~ɕpjaŋ ppos~ɕu nħa s~ɕa kinβalaj nqu qeqaja βinaħ koka qani ɣa kja ββiru nqu kin ru kwaŋs~ɕ,kinβalaj nqu βukil nqu mit rullamu βinaħ nqu pinβaħuw,renki ru pkβalaj nqu qeqaja.mzjup s~ɕa koka nħa ɣa kuki,mqalux nqu kin,ħwas~ɕje kinβalaj,qeqaja nqu kikaj,qqħoniq,βrβal na kinβalaj,kja uzi qu nniqun ru pkβalj na zajrjo.pjaŋ ka pɣluw nqu ps~ɕplaŋ ɣa jaŋ amerika,ʔros~ɕ,ʦ~ʨunko,teko,ilaŋ ru liŋaj na koka taʦ~ʨirlke,ħas~ɕake,wuzpeke,tukuman koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ kura ppos~ɕa ti,s~ɕwein,mnanak nqu kin ru ħwas~ɕje.kaħul amerika mzjup ɣa kuw,iju ru qeqaja nqu pkita nβuw,ramat aβura,kinβalaj nqu βrβal,βwax,kikaj,kikaj nqu pinβaħuw ru ħħi. ɣlɣan qinrjuxan nqu tuqi kis~ɕja ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħul mpitu pɣan kokŋli.kokŋ lu ma qinrjuxan ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal maŋ ru ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħul koŋli.s~ɕpjaŋ nqu ppaŋa ru ppos~ɕa ɣakoŋlu.s~ɕkoki nqu ppos~ɕa ɣa.maki s~ɕa qalaŋ ħopa pis~ɕkaj ke nqu "manas~ɕ"koki ma ħŋaɣan ru mos~ɕke,ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕipolija,tas~ɕka,tus~ɕanpe na qalaŋ maki qu s~ɕkoki nħa ki mtβuʦ~ʨi nqu βinaħ nqu koka na qalaŋ.jaŋ wlumuʦ~ʨi,ins~ɕtanpaw,*alamke*u,s~ɕinteli,kelaz maki qu s~ɕkoki na pinβku na s~ɕpuŋ ru rjax. minʦ~ʨu (ɣaɣ nqu qinnħan,ke,zjuwaw nqu kinβkis~ɕan uni ɣa s~ɕinnħen,llamu nqu s~ɕquliq) ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ kja ms~ɕpat nqu mins~ɕju.s~ɕpjaŋ ħopa nqu minʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ.pinkaki nqu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ koka linpɣan lɣa mpitu pɣan ʦ~ʨjuɣal.ʦ~ʨjuɣal%,ɣluw nqu miʦ~ʨu ɣa tuʦ~ʨje.βinaħ llamu nqu minʦ~ʨu ɣa ħas~ɕiʦ~ʨitan(ms~ɕpat*).mqupu mqjanux nqu te ɣħjaq ros~ɕ minʦ~ʨu.(maɣal.mtzju*).ru maki s~ɕaʔkura mkilux nqu wuzpeke(mopuw pajat.mtzju*).s~ɕpjaŋ nqu ʦ~ʨipoq minʦ~ʨu llamu nqu s~ɕquliq na tunkan(qutux.qutux *)s~ɕquliq na werlwuʦ~ʨu(qutux.qutux*)s~ɕquliq na taʦ~ʨike minʦ~ʨu(qutux.qutux *)s~ɕquliq na ħas~ɕakeʦ~ʨu.(*.mpitu*)wukelaŋʦ~ʨu(*.maɣal*)ru βinaħ llamu nqu ʦ~ʨipoq na minʦ~ʨu(qutux.qutux .mpitu*).kawas~ɕ qutux s~ɕeŋ mqeru kβħul mqeru pɣan mqeru teħuk s~ɕa s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕeŋ kawas~ɕ ru mqeru nqu mopuw kawas~ɕ ɣs~ɕa.maki s~ɕqu koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ na ʔros~ɕʦ~ʨu linpɣan na s~ɕquliq ɣa wajal ŋjut mħɣjut mopuw mtzju maŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕeŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal kβħul mpatul pajat s~ɕquliq.maki s~ɕa koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ nqu s~ɕquliq wuzpeke linpɣan wajal mkwaɣiq teħuk s~ɕa mopuw maŋ qutux s~ɕeŋ mpitu kβħul mpatul qutux ħi koka nqu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ ɣa kja llamu nqu miʦ~ʨu jaŋ tatarlʦ~ʨu linpɣan s~ɕquliq ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal maŋ ʦ~ʨjuɣal s~ɕeŋ mpatul ms~ɕpat maŋ,turlʦ~ʨi linpɣan s~ɕquliq ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal maŋ mtzju s~ɕeŋ mpitu kβħu mpus~ɕal pajatl,jas~ɕajpajzan linpɣan s~ɕquliq ɣa qutux maŋ mtzju s~ɕeŋ mpitu kβħul mpatul maɣal ,zaws~ɕinʦ~ʨu linpɣan s~ɕquliq ɣa qutux s~ɕeŋ ms~ɕpat kβħul mzimal mpitu maŋ*,teiz linpɣan s~ɕquliq ɣa qutux maŋ qutux s~ɕeŋ qutux kβħul mpus~ɕal ms~ɕpat .ijat nanak nqu njux s~ɕβiru te krajat nqu minʦ~ʨu.koka nqu ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ ɣa njux kian s~ɕqu s~ɕquliq na ʔros~ɕ,s~ɕquliq na tukuman,s~ɕquliq na morltowa ru s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨjawzja.linpɣan s~ɕquliq nqu koka ʦ~ʨirlʦ~ʨis~ɕ ɣa mlikuj ɣa pkaki s~ɕa mpatul mqeru.mpajat* %.kneril ɣa maki s~ɕa mzimal.mtzju%. kurɣjzs~ɕtan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa *,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa *.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βis~ɕħkek. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj ms~ɕpat βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa almazβek atamβaje*, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
